checks.name: public_read_safety
checks.description: readResource permitted only when (public OR internal+employee OR partner+partner-subdomain)

checks.name: admin_write_safety
checks.description: writeResource permitted only when email starts with 'admin@'

checks.name: any_must_read_public
checks.description: Any User MUST read a public resource

checks.name: employee_must_read_internal
checks.description: User with @example.com email MUST read internal resources

checks.name: partner_must_read_partner
checks.description: User with @partner.example.com email MUST read partner resources

checks.name: admin_must_write_any
checks.description: User with admin@ email prefix MUST write any resource
